历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category has been approximately 28664 → 32105 → 39959 → 47871, continuously and significantly declining for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative decline of about 19,207 places; in the last 3 years, the decline has accelerated to about 4,000–8,000 places per year, with a baseline of about 47,871 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 63 in 2021, 75 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 108 in 2024, and 135 in 2025, showing continuous and significant expansion; the 2026 plan is 142, an increase of 7 (+5.2%) compared to 2025, with the expansion still relatively pronounced, which has a pushing effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of national key universities; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to an incident where a professor from the School of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 100th (average evaluation), with no significant popularity boost; no historical record of admission cut-off gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Languages and Literature was rated A-, corresponding to the Foreign Languages and Literature category in Physics Category enrollment, but has limited appeal to Physics Category overall; Physics Category-related disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Computer Science, etc.) did not receive A- or above ratings.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence continue to have high social popularity, but the university's related discipline evaluations are average; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates in 2026 is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 (+3.6%) compared to 440,208 in 2025, with slightly intensified competition; regarding the provincial control score, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score of 436 points is slightly lower than the 2024 score of 442 points by 6 points, possibly indicating a slight increase in exam difficulty.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong trend of continuous significant decline in Physics Category for 5 consecutive years, the pushing effect on rankings from continued expansion in 2026 (+5.2%), the slight increase in competition due to a small increase in candidates (+3.6%), and the somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to decline from the 2025 baseline of 47,871; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 49,460, with a range of 48,960–49,960.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 湖南师范大学医学类在广东省2021—2025年最低录取位次分别为5065、32105、34871、39959、47871，呈持续大幅下滑趋势（位次数字逐年增大），五年间位次从5065跌至47871 ，累计下降约42806名。招生计划方面，2021年14人、2022年10人、2023年17人、2024年27人、2025年22人，计划数波动较大。2026年医学类总计划为18人，较2025年的22人减少4 人（缩招约18.2%），其中取消了康复治疗学专业，临床医学保持12人不变，预防医学保持4人不变，医学检验技术从4人减至2人。缩招对位次有提升效应（位次数字减小，更易录 取），但近年位次持续走低的惯性较强。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，是211工程重点建设高校、国家双一流建设高校，办学层次为本科公办，学校类型为师范类。作为湖南省属重点综合性师范大学，其医学部虽非 传统强势医学院校，但依托211平台和长沙地域优势，在广东省考生中仍有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 近年来全国范围内医学类专业报考热度持续攀升，临床医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。湖南师范大学医学类在广东省招生规模较小（2026年仅18人），且2026年取消了康复治疗 学专业，招生专业精简为临床医学、预防医学、医学检验技术三个方向，专业结构更加聚焦。长沙作为新一线城市，对广东考生具备一定的地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型主值（42649）与近年位次持续下滑趋势，考虑2026年缩招18.2%的提振效应与医学热度上升的抵消作用，预测2026年湖南师范大学医学类在广东省最低录取 位次为43449名，波动区间为42949—43949名。该位次较2025年（47871）有所回升（位次数字减小，更易录取），主要反映缩招带来的竞争缓和，但位次仍处于近年高位区间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Guangdong Province from 2021 to 2025 were 5065, 32105, 34871, 39959, and 47871 respectively, showing a continuous and significant downward trend (ranking numbers increase year by year). Over five years, the ranking dropped from 5065 to 47871, a cumulative decline of approximately 42,806 places. In terms of enrollment plan, there were 14 students in 2021, 10 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 27 in 2024, and 22 in 2025, with considerable fluctuations. The total plan for medical category in 2026 is 18 students, a decrease of 4 students (approximately 18.2% reduction) compared to 22 in 2025. Among these, the Rehabilitation Therapy major has been canceled, Clinical Medicine remains unchanged at 12 students, Preventive Medicine remains unchanged at 4 students, and Medical Laboratory Technology has been reduced from 4 to 2 students. The enrollment reduction has an uplifting effect on rankings (ranking numbers decrease, making admission easier), but the inertia of the recent continuous decline in rankings is strong.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province. It is a key university under the national 211 Project and a national Double First-Class construction university. Its educational level is a public undergraduate institution, and its school type is normal (teacher training). As a key comprehensive normal university under Hunan Province, its medical department, although not a traditionally strong medical school, still holds certain appeal for Guangdong Province candidates due to its 211 platform and the regional advantages of Changsha.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors nationwide has been continuously rising, with core majors like Clinical Medicine experiencing particularly intense competition. The medical category of Hunan Normal University has a small enrollment scale in Guangdong Province (only 18 students in 2026), and the Rehabilitation Therapy major has been canceled in 2026, streamlining the enrollment majors to three directions: Clinical Medicine, Preventive Medicine, and Medical Laboratory Technology, making the major structure more focused. Changsha, as a new first-tier city, has a certain regional appeal to Guangdong candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the main value of the M3 supply-demand elasticity model (42649) with the recent trend of continuous ranking decline, and considering the offsetting effects of the 18.2% enrollment reduction boost in 2026 and the rising popularity of medicine, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Hunan Normal University's medical category in Guangdong Province in 2026 will be 43449, with a fluctuation range of 42949 to 43949. This ranking represents an improvement compared to 2025 (47871) (ranking number decreases, making admission easier), mainly reflecting the eased competition due to enrollment reduction, but the ranking remains in the high range of recent years.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety option.
